body: With ClimaDiagnostics 0.2.10, we can now add the start date directly to the output files
title: Add start date to diagnostics

body:
Minor version 0.15.4

small notes:
- with ClimaAnalysis v0.5.11, CI shading in plots should be fixed.
- docs should be built with julia 1.11 (colored print in getting started).
title: Release minor version 0.15.4
